intro: Mutants are flooding the planets! Destroy them all! Improve your technology, upgrade weapons and turn dangerous worlds into safe havens.
description:
The captivating clicker game in which you join space expansion!
Take on the role of an autonomous orbital station in this space adventure! Your goal is to prepare planets for the landing of a team of explorers. There’s just one problem: the planets are inhabited by many hostile creatures who are not very happy about the arrival of uninvited guests...
Destroy the mutants, get coins and buy improvements that will make you even more effective in combat: increase the damage dealt by each shot, slow down enemies when hit or reduce the reloading time.

Game features:
- Many progression options: upgrade weapons and abilities to fight more effectively.
- Intuitive gameplay: this simple and entertaining clicker doesn’t require you to have masterful skills, but still keeps you on your toes.
- Destroying mutants: every click is a step towards victory over alien creatures inhabiting dangerous planets.

Every click brings you closer to getting a planet ready for a successful landing. Use the full potential of the orbital station to clear the planets of any threat! The squad of heroes will not get here soon, but the future of their mission depends on your work.
